properties.description: SMAT RPSR - Source to ADLS Stage Folder

activities.name: cp_getSMAT_RPSR_data
activities.description: Run the Custom query to fetch RPSR data from SMAT server (source) and copy into the Stage ADLS2.

oracleReaderQuery.value:
select distinct e.eci_id,
		SUBSTR(e.r_Code,0,INSTR(e.r_Code,'-')-1) as PROJ_NB,
        e.r_Code, 
        mssp.r_supp,    
        mssp.actual_ind, 
        mc.order_seq, 
        msn.short_desc, 
        m.scheduled_date, 
        m.planned_date, 
        m.actual_date,
        e.eci_comment, 
        m_pck_configs.get_attr_value ('P6003',e.eci_id,4,'ECI','ECI') eci_attr_4,
		nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DISCIPLINE'), 'NO DISC') as DISCIPLINE,
		nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DEPARTMENT'), 'NO DEPT') as DEPARTMENT,
		DECODE(UPPER('Y'),'Y', max(r.buyer),NULL) as PLANNED_BUYER,
		Max(rnls.DESCRIPTION) as REQ_DESC  -- Not part of the original Query but had to added to get the REQ_DESC
        /*replace(m_pck_ppd_defaults.get_value('ZX_PROJ_NR') || 
                chr(124) || nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DISCIPLINE'), 'NO DISC') ||  
                chr(124) || e.r_code || 
                chr(124) || mssp.r_supp  || 
                chr(124) || replace(msn.short_desc,'|',null)|| 
                chr(124) || to_char(m.scheduled_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')|| 
                chr(124) || to_char(m.planned_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')|| 
                chr(124) || to_char(m.actual_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')||
                chr(124) || nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DEPARTMENT'), 'NO DEPT') || 
                CHR(124) || e.eci_comment  || -- 610-PRB-0901 11Dec06                                           
                DECODE(UPPER('Y'),'Y', CHR(124) ||max(r.buyer) ||CHR(124) ||poh.po_number ,NULL)|| 
      CHR(124) || mssp.actual_ind ||CHR(124)
                    , CHR(10), ' ') output */                                                                        
                 from    
                 m_sys.m_ms_config_nls msn
                 ,m_sys.m_ms_configs mc             
                 ,m_sys.m_milestones m
                 ,m_sys.m_eng_comm_items e     
                 ,m_sys.m_reqs r              
                 ,m_sys.m_req_nls rnls       
                 ,m_sys.m_po_headers poh     
                 ,m_sys.m_ms_suppl_plans mssp  
                 WHERE  1 = 1
                 AND  rnls.nls_id(+) = @{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_nls_id}
                 AND  rnls.r_id(+)   = r.r_id      
                 AND (('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.P_ZP_MSSUPP}'= 'Y' AND Mssp.R_SUPP IS NOT NULL)  	--Parameter_1
      OR ('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.P_ZP_MSSUPP}'='N' AND Mssp.R_SUPP IS NULL))   					--Parameter_1
                 AND  r.r_code(+)    = e.r_code    
                 AND  r.proj_id(+)   = e.proj_id   
                 AND  m.mssp_id      = mssp.mssp_id(+) 
                 AND  m.enci_id is null       
                 AND  e.eci_id = m.eci_id
                 and  m.mc_id = mc.mc_id 
                 and  mc.mc_id = msn.mc_id 
                 and  msn.nls_id = 1
--                and  e.proj_id = p_proj_id   
                 and  e.proj_id in ('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}') 							--Parameter 4
    and  poh.poh_id (+) = e.poh_id    
                 and mc.order_seq in 
                 (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.a_ord_seq}', '[^,]+',1,ROWNUM) 	--Parameter_3
                        FROM   dual
                        CONNECT BY ROWNUM <= (LENGTH('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.a_ord_seq}') - LENGTH(REPLACE('@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.a_ord_seq}',','))+1)) --Parameter_3, Parameter_3
                 group by  e.eci_id, e.r_Code,        mssp.r_supp, mssp.actual_ind, mc.order_seq, msn.short_desc, m.scheduled_date, 
              m.planned_date,   m.actual_date,    e.eci_comment,       nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DISCIPLINE'), 'NO DISC'),
              nvl(amp_get_eciv_attr_cd(e.eci_id, 'DEPARTMENT'), 'NO DEPT'),  poh.po_number 
                order by  e.r_Code, mssp.r_supp, mssp.actual_ind, mc.order_seq ;
